_comment: Counties and states that have ever had an active contractor. Pages stay indexable forever once a contractor signs up — even if the contractor later drops the area, the page does not revert to noindex (the fallback 800 number still routes calls). Server.js auto-merges currently-active counties into this list at runtime, but that in-memory state resets on redeploy. Commit this file to make the indexable status durable. NEVER REMOVE entries.
